plugins.name: anti-vibe-coding
plugins.description: Plugin de desenvolvimento disciplinado com conhecimentos de programador senior. v7.3.0 — Next.js Stack Knowledge. 15 atoms Next.js+React em ingles extraidos de 9 fontes (94% rastreabilidade, 0 rework). T1: app-router, RSC, server-actions, middleware, security-stack, react-hooks. T2: data-fetching/cache, rendering, perf+turbopack, testing, ui+styling, errors+observability, suspense. T3: pages-router-migration, supabase. Detector: nextjs+react StackIds distintos; probeReact + next.config anchor. Parser: INDEX EN (RF-11). Infra: THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES, INDEX.md (By Cross-Stack Skill/Tier/Keyword), 2 fixtures, 2 E2E (14 testes). Compound: stack-knowledge-extraction-workflow validado como template reusavel.
